SessionStart.command: echo '[SessionStart] branch=' $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo no-git-branch)

PreToolUse.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E '(rm -rf /|sudo rm -rf|:\(\)\{\ :\|\:& \};:|mkfs\.|dd if=)' >/dev/null && echo 'Blocked dangerous command' && exit 2 || exit 0

PostToolUse.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run format --silent >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi

Stop.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run lint --silent >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi
